Jos 20:7-9. THE ISRAELITES APPOINT BY NAME THE CITIES OF REFUGE
Jos 20:7-9. THE ISRAELITES APPOINT BY NAME THE CITIES OF REFUGE
Jos 20:7-9. THE ISRAELITES APPOINT BY NAME THE CITIES OF REFUGE
our great cities shall be taken from us, that we shall have no place in them.

matches.lb: Quoting Commentary: Kli Yakar on Numbers 35:6:1
matches.x: Forty-two cities. Corresponding to the 42 encampments where Israel camped and were like strangers in all of them. Similarly, they gave to the Levites, who had no portion in the land, 42 cities. And the cities of refuge shall be from among the cities of the Levites because one who flees to his city of refuge is a stranger there. There is concern that the inhabitants of the land might say to him,…
